dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4808 IS: Privately Insured Credit Unions Conversion Modernization Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Cortez Masto (for herself and Mr. Moreno) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs

form.official-title: To amend the Federal Credit Union Act with respect to conversion modernization for privately insured credit unions.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Privately Insured Credit Unions Conversion Modernization Act.

section.header: Conversion modernization for privately 6 insured credit unions
section.text: Section 206(d)(2) of the Federal Credit Union Act (12 U.S.C. 1786(d)(2)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in the first sentence, by striking in a vote in which at least 20 per centum of the total membership of the credit union participates; and
in the second sentence, by striking not more than thirty nor less than seven days and inserting not less than 90 days.
